videos.title: Procreate 5.4.11
videos.description:
This update to Procreate brings:
🎨 Active layer eyedropper
✅ Multiple layer actions
🐛 A fix for the brush duplicate bug

Head to the AppStore to download Procreate 5.4.11 today!
#Procreate

videos.title: #YouMadeThis: Shanghai 2026
videos.description:
Hello from Shanghai 👋 Congratulations to the selected artists who had their artworks showcased at the pop up in Shanghai a few weeks ago. Here's a recap of the event and a slideshow of the wonderful artworks that helped our event come to life. 

Where else would you like to see YouMadeThis shown? Comment below ✨

videos.description:

videos.title: Intro to Procreate Dreams 2
videos.description:
Join us for a walkthrough of Procreate Dreams, an animation app available on iPad. Learn about frame-by-frame animation, keyframing, performing and editing with Tai, our in-house animator.

Download the “Training Day” project to follow along: https://procre.at/training-day-animation 

Chapters:
0:00 – Intro
0:52 – Flipbook
4:55 – Timeline
6:36 – Keyframe
8:26 – Performing
10:08 – Compose
12:15 – Outro

For more information on how to use specific features, see our online handbook at https://help.

videos.title: What's New in Procreate Dreams 2
videos.description:
Find out about everything arriving in the free Procreate Dreams 2 update, available now. 

We’ll take you through everything from the all new Flipbook Experience, to Keyboard Shortcuts and Advanced Export. We hope the new features charge up your workflow, and we’re excited to see what you create with the new brushes — so please share your art with us!  

Download today on the App Store.
 
Chapters:
00:00 Introduction
01:17 File Upgrade
01:27 Redesigned Timeline
02:00 Creating Content
02:39 Anima

videos.title: Activating Layer Select | Learn to Procreate
videos.description:
Speed up your workflow with Layer Select! 
This tool is a great option for those of us with way too many layers to manage. Watch the video to set it up or head to procre.at/layercontentegestures to learn more. 

Chapters:
00:00 Intro
00:31 Find Gesture Controls
00:42 Activating by touch
01:12 Activating by Modify Key
01:36 Activating by Touch and Hold
02:08 Activating with Hover using Apple Pencil Pro
02:22 Pro Tips

Artwork by Taieri Eve
